title: ddx-term-web: xterm-client unit tests mock Terminal/ResizeObserver → typecheck+lint+vitest all PASS while the fix breaks live DOM/WS input; only real-browser drive verifies
ddx-term rebuild changes Next.js chunk hashes → browser MUST hard-reload (Cmd+Shift+R) or stale chunks mismatch new server → typing/create silently break
ddx-term-mcp MCP term_create throws STACK_LAUNCH_FAILED reclaim-race (server.js:736 pollUntilHealthy) even when broker healthy; ensureWeb silently no-ops if dist/web standalone unbuilt

ddx-term broker ControlModeAttach retries pty.spawn(tmux -CC attach) every 2s FOREVER on failure → leaks PTYs until macOS ptmx_max=511 exhausted (Ghostty 'cannot allocate pty', can't type/create). Recovery: pkill broker + sweep tmux. Fix: cap retries + backoff.
ddx-term unit tests inject deps → GREEN while real bundle launch broke; ALWAYS production-test 'node dist/server.js' before publish
Harden term.gateway.ts WS-entry terminalId cast: TerminalIdSchema.safeParse + close(1008) on failure (pre-existing, security-reviewer MED)
